name: 抽样
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Stats & Probability / Stats & Probability
curriculum_points: Understand that statistics can be used to gain information about a population by examining a sample of the population, and that generalizations from a sample are valid only if the sample is representative.
Generate and use random sampling to produce representative samples and support valid inferences about a population.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「抽样」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Understand that statistics can be used to gain information about a population by examining a sample of the population, a…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Generate and use random sampling to produce representative samples and support v… 对理解「抽样」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
